title: VTQ information hub 2025 to 2026: key dates and deadlines
body: "Ofqual has worked with awarding organisations to compile the following information on key dates and deadlines for vocational and technical qualifications (VTQ) in 2025 to 2026.   This VTQ Information Hub is most relevant to school and college staff working in the administration or delivery of Level 3, Level 1/2 and Level 2 vocational and technical qualifications used for progression. It will help you prepare for the awarding organisation key dates and deadlines ahead of awarding in summer 2026.   There are deadlines that awarding organisations need centres to meet to ensure the timely delivery of results in August. It is important that centres carry out internal activities early enough to ensure the awarding organisation deadlines are met.  Information is arranged by awarding organisation and then by qualification. You can download csv files of the combined data for all awarding organisations, or for each individual organisation. In addition, each awarding organisation has provided a link to a webpage with information about their qualifications and key dates.  We are interested in your feedback about the VTQ Information Hub. If you have any comments about the usefulness of the hub or if there is information that you would like to see included, please email this address:  VTQInformationHub@ofqual.gov.uk  The VTQ Information Hub will be updated periodically to reflect changes made from awarding organisations regarding key dates.   Download key dates for all awarding organisations               Key dates for all awarding organisations    CSV, 2.26 MB  View online       Active IQ  Key dates and deadlines for qualifications from Active IQ. For more details see Active IQ’s delivery of results information page.   Download key dates for Active IQ               Key dates for Active IQ    CSV, 30.7 KB  View online       Fitness Vocationally Related Qualification (VRQs)     End Date Event     8 May 2026 Term time checkpoint 1   19 June 2026 Latest date for external assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Latest date for internal assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Qualification claim date   3 July 2026 Deadline for submission of evidence for quality assurance   24 July 2026 Latest date by which external quality assurance must be completed   7 August 2026 Latest date by which certificates will be released to centres     Back to contents  Performance Table Qualifications (PTQs)     End Date Event     8 May 2026 Term time checkpoint 1   19 June 2026 Latest date for external assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Latest date for internal assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Qualification claim date   3 July 2026 Deadline for submission of evidence for quality assurance   24 July 2026 Latest date by which external quality assurance must be completed   7 August 2026 Latest date by which certificates will be released to centres     Back to contents  Technical Occupational Qualification     End Date Event     8 May 2026 Term time checkpoint 1   19 June 2026 Latest date for external assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Latest date for internal assessments to be completed   19 June 2026 Qualification claim date   3 July 2026 Deadline for submission of evidence for quality assurance   24 July 2026 Latest date by which external quality assurance...
